meaning: National Aeronautics and Space Administration (美国)国家航空和宇宙航行局
examples: NASA plans to launch a satellite to study cosmic rays.
NASA discovered a mathematical error in its calculations.
NASA has started a 10-year search for extraterrestrial intelligence.
Sunday's supermoon will technically be a perigee full moon, the closest full moon of the year, NASA says.
This month, the White House ordered a sweeping independent review of Nasa's manned spaceflight strategy.
